title: PokéQuest Icons
description: An icon pack for map mods with original icon designs similarly to Pokémon Quest icons.
body:
PokéQuest Icons is a resource pack created for Journeymap and Xaero’s Minimap/World Map, featuring hand-drawn pixel art icons that blend the blocky charm of Pokémon Quest with the familiar style of existing vanilla mob icons.

**What’s Included in Version 1.0**

-  Full icon set for all Generation 1 Pokémon
-  Icons for variants and later-generation evolutions connected to Gen 1
-  Consistent custom pixel-art style
-  Works seamlessly with both Journeymap and Xaero’s minimap/world map mods

This release marks the first complete milestone of the project and represents the visual direction for all future expansions.

**Ongoing Development**

While Gen 1 is now complete, the project continues!
Future updates will expand into:
- Additional generations
- Regional variants
- Alternate icon styles
- Extra optional designs hidden throughout the pack

**Follow the Project**

You can keep up with progress, vote on icon designs, and see work-in-progress previews on the official Cobblemon Discord.

**Downloads**

The latest packs will always be available here, including occasional secret alternate icons if you know where to look.
